BROKER OFFERING MEMORANDUM - DRAFT EXCERPT
Prepared for investment committee review; values below are not approval.

Executive rent table:
Residential rent monthly: $3,250 per unit per month at stabilized occupancy of 94%.
Residential rent monthly: $3,050 per unit in the earlier leasing slide on page 18.

Valuation bridge:
Exit cap rate 5.25%.
Appendix sensitivity case only: exit cap rate 4.75%.

Cost summary:
Land acquisition $34,500,000.
Hard costs $162,000,000.
Soft costs $27,500,000.
Senior construction debt amount $162,500,000.

False-positive notes:
Call 604-555-0120 for tours.
Legal reference exhibit 5.25(b) is not a cap rate.
